headline: Moderna set for uneventful Q2 report ahead of key data readouts, says Jefferies
summary: Moderna Inc (NASDAQ:MRNA, XETRA:0QF) is expected to report second quarter results on July 31, with investors focused on the impact of seasonal COVID-19 vaccine demand and updates on the company’s late-stage pipeline, including anticipated Phase III melanoma data. headline: ValuEngine Weekly Market Summary And Commentary
summary: Markets remained mixed last week, with sector leadership continuing to rotate beneath a relatively stable broader market.
